title: langchain
content: langchain is a framework for building ai applications. it provides tools, agents, prompts, memory, retrieval, and integrations with llm providers.

title: mcp
content: mcp stands for model context protocol. it is an open protocol that enables ai applications to securely connect to external tools, data sources, and services.

title: rag
content: rag stands for retrieval augmented generation. it combines information retrieval with large language models to generate responses grounded in external knowledge.

title: artificial intelligence
content: artificial intelligence (ai) is the capability of computational systems to perform tasks typically associated with human intelligence, such as learning, reasoning, problem-solving, perception, and decision-making.

title: vector database
content: a vector database stores vector embeddings and enables similarity search. examples include chroma, pinecone, weaviate, qdrant, and milvus.

title: embeddings
content: embeddings are numerical representations of data that capture semantic meaning. they allow systems to compare text based on similarity rather than exact keyword matches.

title: agent
content: an ai agent uses a language model together with tools and reasoning steps to accomplish tasks on behalf of a user.

title: tool calling
content: tool calling allows a language model to invoke external functions and services to obtain information or perform actions.

title: prompt engineering
content: prompt engineering is the practice of designing instructions and context to guide the behavior of language models.

title: python
content: python is a high-level programming language known for readability and a rich ecosystem of libraries for data science, machine learning, and web development.

title: json
content: json stands for javascript object notation. it is a lightweight data-interchange format commonly used for apis and configuration files.

title: openai
content: openai develops artificial intelligence models and platforms including chatgpt and the gpt family of models.

title: fastmcp
content: fastmcp is a python framework for building mcp servers quickly using decorators and simple tool definitions.

title: langgraph
content: langgraph is a framework for building stateful multi-step agent workflows and orchestration systems.

title: retriever
content: a retriever is a component in a rag system responsible for finding relevant documents or passages based on a user's query.

title: chunking
content: chunking is the process of splitting large documents into smaller sections before generating embeddings and storing them in a vector database.

title: similarity search
content: similarity search finds documents whose embeddings are closest to the query embedding according to a distance metric such as cosine similarity.

title: llm
content: llm stands for large language model. llms are trained on large amounts of text data and can generate human-like responses.

title: transformer
content: the transformer architecture introduced self-attention mechanisms and became the foundation of modern large language models.

title: demo company policy
content: employees may work remotely up to three days per week. manager approval is required for additional remote work days.

title: demo vacation policy
content: employees receive twenty annual leave days per calendar year. unused leave does not carry over to the next year.

title: demo expense policy
content: business expenses above one thousand dollars require director approval before reimbursement can be processed.
